meta.title: Novada MCP — Web Search, Extract, Crawl & Research
meta.description: Real-time web data for AI agents. Search via 5 engines (Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Yahoo, Yandex), extract content from any URL (batch mode), crawl websites (BFS/DFS with path filters), map site structure, and run multi-step research with citations. Powered by 100M+ proxy IPs across 195 countries with anti-bot bypass. Includes MCP Prompts and Resources for agent-native workflows.
